description:
Single sign-on for Jellyfin via OpenID Connect and SAML 2.0 — works with self-hosted and
managed identity providers such as Authelia, Authentik, Keycloak, Pocket ID and Kanidm,
with multiple providers side by side.
Role-based access from provider claims (login, administrator, library folders, Live TV),
avatar sync, self-service account linking, and an optional SSO-only mode that disables
password login for every account except a designated break-glass admin.
Sign-in works in the Jellyfin Web UI and, via Quick Connect, in native clients.
A security-first continuation of the archived 9p4/jellyfin-plugin-sso.
Documentation and provider setup guides: https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso
name: Community SSO for Jellyfin
overview: Sign in to Jellyfin through OpenID Connect or SAML 2.0 identity providers.

versions.changelog:
Jellyfin 12.0 (.NET 10) beta 5.0.0-JF12-beta (plugin version 5.0.0.26).
Install via the beta repository URL (a Jellyfin 12.0 server picks this build automatically by targetAbi):
https://raw.githubusercontent.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/manifest-beta/manifest.json

Scope note (#743): the JF12/5.0 line is **not validated against a live Jellyfin 12.0 server yet** — no 12.0 GA server exists to run the E2E checklist against. It is CI-built and unit/conformance-tested only, and it is NOT part of the 4.x (Jellyfin 10.11) release-candidate gate; the 5.0 line clears its own live-validation gate when a Jellyfin 12.0 RC/GA build is available. Use these betas for testing, not production.


## What's Changed
* Treat whitespace-only SAML roles as blank in the login allow-list by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/957
* Add a manifest-only regeneration dispatch as a recovery path by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/958
* Bound the checksum-sidecar fetches to the entries that survive the cap by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/959
* Resurrect the Stryker mutation gate via a VSTest twin project by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/960
* Split the mutation run into three parallel scope legs by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/963
* Pin every SsoAudit emission: shape, level, CRLF-strip, emission points by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/964
* Make a forgotten rate-limit gate a red build; pin the 429 shapes by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/965
* Exercise the PAR-enabled challenge path — the untested production default by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/966
* Test the login-button hosted service and pin the SAML hostile-name route by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/967
* E2E: stable-binding relogin, admin-policy asserts, SSO-only round-trip by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/968
* Close the four small unit holes from the coverage audit by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/969
* Exercise the SSRF connect guard at the real socket layer by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/970
* E2E: exercise SAML metadata import/SP-metadata, assert secrets-at-rest + audit by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/971


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/compare/5.0.0-JF12-beta.25...5.0.0-JF12-beta.26

Scope note (#743): the JF12/5.0 line is **not validated against a live Jellyfin 12.0 server yet** — no 12.0 GA server exists to run the E2E checklist against. It is CI-built and unit/conformance-tested only, and it is NOT part of the 4.x (Jellyfin 10.11) release-candidate gate; the 5.0 line clears its own live-validation gate when a Jellyfin 12.0 RC/GA build is available. Use these betas for testing, not production.


## What's Changed
* Fail the publish when a Jellyfin generation drops out of the manifest by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/946
* Generate the plugin manifest in-house: paginated, checksum-paired, per-ABI capped by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/947
* Skip blank configured role entries in all allow-list matching by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/953
* Publish both betas from main; retire the stable channel until first stable by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/955


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/compare/4.3.0-beta.11...5.0.0-JF12-beta.25

## What's Changed

* Add SAML service-provider metadata endpoint by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/567
* Forward-merge main into 4.2 (post-4.1.0.0 fixes) by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/572
* Add a SAML SP signing-key rollover (part 1 of #491) by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/573
* Forward-merge main into 4.2 (codeql.yml advanced setup) by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/576
* Add an admin Test-connection action per provider by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/577
* Add admin config export/import (#161) by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/581
* Forward-merge main into 4.2 (README banner) by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/580
* Accept a SAML response signed by an optional secondary IdP certificate (completes #491) by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/582
* Forward-merge main into 4.2 (CA1873 log hygiene + Alpha docs) by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/588
* Forward-merge main into 4.2 (the 4.1.1.0 line + release channels) by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/595
* Multi-target net9.0/net10.0 for the 10.11 and 12.0 lines (#135) by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/596
* Forward-merge main into 4.2 (3-part versions + release naming) by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/598
* Evaluate SAML assertion roles once per login (#479) by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/599
* Scoped Stryker.NET mutation testing for the SAML/OIDC core (#169) by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/600
* Weekly SharpFuzz job over the SAML parse surface (#174) by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/601
* Forward-merge main into 4.2, set 4.2 to its 4.2.0 feature target by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/603
* Collapse SamlChallenge relayState init to a ternary (#456) by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/604
* Jellyfin 12.0 (5.0) beta publish leg + two-channel manifest model (#135) by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/605
* Attest SLSA build provenance for the release plugin zip (#147) by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/609
* Drop the deprecated assertion-embedded SAML/Auth path (#528) by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/610
* Document the whole-object-replace contract on provider config (S6964, #196) by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/615
* Decompose ConvertSigningKeys to cut OIDC id_token validator complexity (S3776, #196) by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/616
* Accept-with-reason analyzer dispositions in .editorconfig (#104 Unit 0) by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/617
* Make WebResponse string ops culture-invariant (#104 Unit 1) by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/618
* Adopt System.Threading.Lock in three lock sites (#104 Unit 3) by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/619
* Add paramName to ArgumentException throws (#104 Unit 2, MA0015) by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/620
* Correct the stale target-direction section in ARCHITECTURE.md (#318) by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/621
* Test the write-only secret converter redaction contract (#192) by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/622
* Test the AuthorizeStateBinding anti-forgery cookie (#192) by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/623
* Test the SsoRateLimitGate 429 + fail-open invariant (#192) by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/624
* Test the admin-or-self authorization helper (#192) by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/625
* Anchor JF12 beta releases to the built 4.2 commit (#627) by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/628


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/compare/4.1.2-beta.4...5.0.0-JF12-beta.15

## What's Changed
* Validate id_token auth_time against max_age; fail closed by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/972
* Add OIDC back-channel logout (logout_token validation + endpoint) by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/973
* Add opt-in login-time deprovisioning on role-denied SSO logins by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/975
* Read the manifest via jq --rawfile so the beta publish survives arg-length growth by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/979
* Publish the newest JF11 beta as the repo's Latest release by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/981
* Add a changelog entry for the managed login-page buttons by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/983
* Add the SAML deprovision-off parity test by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/984


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/compare/4.3.0-beta.12...4.3.0-beta.13

## What's Changed
* Add SPDX license + copyright headers to all source files [#747] by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/898
* Measure coverage in CI and gate the security surface [#718] by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/900
* Scope the JF12/5.0 line out of the 4.x RC [#743] by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/901
* Make a report-less Stryker run fail visibly and pause the weekly cron [#899] by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/902
* Fix the community-standards gaps: CoC filename + issue forms [#903] by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/904
* Add admin config-page controls for the login-button settings [#722] by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/905
* Capture the SAML SessionIndex at login for Single Logout [#727] by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/906
* Validate inbound SAML LogoutRequest and revoke matching sessions [#727] by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/907
* Surface the Single-Logout settings in the admin config page [#727] by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/908
* Document the Single Logout security posture in SECURITY.md [#727] by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/909
* Add SP-initiated outbound SAML Single Logout [#727] by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/910
* Remove the unreferenced inherited demo recording [#784] by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/911
* Refresh the delivery-metrics evidence for the current release [#719] by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/912

## What's Changed
* Link the ASVS/RFC 9700 conformance self-assessment from SECURITY by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/846
* Enable deterministic build settings and document reproducibility by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/847
* Route the OpenID discovery/JWKS/token fetches through the SSRF-hardened transport by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/848
* Enforce a minimum asymmetric signing-key strength for IdP signing keys [#733] by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/849
* Provision new SSO users disabled pending admin approval [#737] by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/850
* Support step-up / MFA passthrough for OpenID [#757] by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/851
* Map IdP groups to a parental-rating ceiling (MaxParentalRatingScore) [#736] by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/852
* Show and copy the exact OIDC redirect URI on the provider form [#724] by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/853
* Import SAML provider config from IdP metadata (URL or XML) [#735] by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/854
* Add a SAML provider configuration admin UI [#725] by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/855
* Correct the actions/checkout pin comment to its exact tag [#858] by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/859
* Add one-click provider templates to the config page [#726] by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/857
* Auto-manage the login-page sign-in buttons (core) [#722] by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/860
* Add the Single Logout session-state store (SLO-1) [#727] by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/861
* Capture the id_token at login for Single Logout (SLO-1b) [#727] by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/862
* OIDC RP-initiated logout (SLO-2) [#727] by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/863
* Deduplicate the SAML metadata action doc; document two nested members by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/874
* Add a shared TestUsers.Named factory; remove three copied user helpers by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/875
* Finish the module placement: SSOViewsController + RequestHelpers into Http, dissolve the Kernel test folder by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/877
* Collapse the two identical SAML signing-key resolvers into one helper by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/876
* Delete the zero-consumer ILoginService interface by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/878
* Consolidate served assets into one flat Web/ folder; add a resource-resolution test by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/879
* Pin namespace to folder under Api/ with a conformance test by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/880
* Document the internal API surface and enforce it via SA1600 by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/881
* Pin the internal-doc gate severities so it cannot be silently disabled by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/882
* Point the repo docs at the consolidated wiki; fix module-table and beta-trigger drift by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/883
* Add a CI wiki-lint drift guard by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/884
* Record the OIDC/SAML shared-abstraction evaluation; codify the ≥2-consumer rule by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/885

## What's Changed
* SSO-only login (DisablePasswordLogin) with a break-glass admin safety net (#165) by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/665
* Fail closed on a null FolderRoleMap.Folders in RolePrivilegeMapper by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/693
* Key the OpenID authorize-state store on UTC, not machine-local time by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/696
* Redesign the provider config page: workspace, chunked accordion, safe defaults by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/697
* Harden SAML parsing: dispose the certificate, xsd-faithful time bounds, close XPath injection by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/698
* Polish the served auth and self-service linking pages by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/701
* Unify the challenge NewPath resolver and inline a single-caller OIDC wrapper by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/702
* Correct the ProviderConfigValidator doc and tighten RequestHelpers visibility by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/703
* Stop repointing third-party-provider accounts under SSO-only login by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/704
* Type the rate-limit endpoint-class bucket keys by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/705
* Audit SAML DoNotValidateAudience as an insecure toggle by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/706
* Restyle browser-navigated SSO error responses and reword the denial by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/707

* List SSO-only login in the README feature set by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/700
* Add a docs/ pointer to the Wiki by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/711
* Stop reflecting IdP error text into the OpenID browser error page by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/709
* Show the real OpenSSF badges and a release badge in the README by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/770
* Remove the orphaned img/custom-button.png asset by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/771
* Bound the untrusted SAML DOM with MaxCharactersInDocument by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/772
* Add a restrictive Permissions-Policy to the served auth and error pages by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/773
* Clarify that this is an independent plugin repository, not the official catalog by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/774

* Extract the Secrets module (secrets at rest) into Api/Secrets by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/779
